_comment: Example consolidated provenance record (RunReport) emitted per training run (run: baseline_yolo26m_bf_seed42, the seed-42 YOLO26m source-domain baseline). Absolute machine paths and the hostname have been redacted to placeholders; all hyperparameters, the seed, environment identification, and final aggregate metrics are the real recorded values. One such record is serialized for every run in the study; the full set is available from the corresponding author on reasonable academic request together with the training code.

environment.pip_freeze: pip_freeze.txt (full environment snapshot serialized alongside this record)

metrics._note: Final aggregate source-domain validation metrics. Per-epoch metrics are recorded in results.csv (not reproduced here).
